query:
INSERT INTO user_key_generations (
            user_id,
            status,
            suite_id,
            generation,
            wrapper_revision,
            wrapped_mk_by_password,
            wrapped_mk_by_recovery,
            account_root_public,
            wrapped_account_root_private
         ) VALUES ($1, 'active', $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8)
